features.name: parameter forwarded to submodule via named port connection
features.description: Code should include a submodule instantiation where the submodule parameter is driven by the parent module's parameter via a named port connection

features.name: setparam followed by hierarchy check
features.description: Code should include a parameter set via setparam on a module followed by a hierarchy -check command on the same top module
features.snippet:
yosys setparam -set top_param 1 topmodule
yosys hierarchy -check -top topmodule
